contact.metadataDescription: Get in touch with the Kliekjesclub team.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: Questions, feedback, or an idea? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.emailBody: The fastest way to reach us is by email. We aim to reply within two working days.
contact.faqBody: A lot of questions are already answered in our FAQ. Check there first — your answer may already be there.
contact.aboutBody: We're a Dutch initiative fighting food waste by making leftovers from home kitchens and restaurants available to neighbours.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist (anymore).

impact.metadataDescription: See how much food Kliekjesclub has helped save over the past period.
impact.heading: Together we make an impact
impact.subheading: Every leftover shared is less food wasted.
impact.methodBody: We estimate using Dutch averages: ≈ 1.25 kg CO₂ equivalent and 1,000 liters of water per meal. Figures are updated daily based on picked-up reservations.

downloadApp.metadataDescription: Download Kliekjesclub on iPhone and share or find leftovers on the go — faster reservations, instant alerts and everything in reach.
downloadApp.subheading: Reserve in a few taps, get notified the moment a new leftover appears nearby and chat directly with neighbours — wherever you are.
downloadApp.heroFreeNote: Free to download — for iPhone with iOS 16 or higher.
downloadApp.screenshotAlt: Screenshot of the Kliekjesclub app: a dish with pickup time, location and a confirm button.
downloadApp.featuresSubheading: The web is great for long sessions — the app is built for quick action, on the go.
downloadApp.feature1Body: Get notified the moment a new leftover pops up in your neighbourhood — before it's gone.
downloadApp.feature2Body: Claim a dish in a few taps. No forms, no fuss — just go and pick it up.
downloadApp.feature3Body: Quickly message the host if you're running late. Everything in one app.
downloadApp.feature4Body: Got leftovers yourself? Snap a photo and post it online in thirty seconds.
downloadApp.stepsHeading: From download to meal in three steps
downloadApp.step1Body: Tap the App Store button, sign in to your account or create one for free.
downloadApp.step2Body: Browse leftovers from neighbours and local hosts, filtered by distance and pickup time.
downloadApp.step3Body: Confirm in one tap, get pickup details in chat and enjoy your meal.
downloadApp.androidNoticeBody: We're hard at work on the Android version. For now you can fully participate via web at kliekjesclub.nl.
downloadApp.ctaBody: Download the app and share or save your first meal today.
